error_signature: empty array returned from Get All Orders
title: Shopify Get All Orders returns empty array
symptom: When using the Shopify node to get all orders, it executes without errors but returns an empty array, despite existing orders in Shopify.
not_this_if: Specific order fetch returns valid data
root_cause: The empty array response can occur due to restrictive filters set in the node's parameters, such as status or date fields, which may inadvertently limit the results returned from the Shopify API.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the Shopify 'Get All Orders' node in n8n.
Review and adjust the parameters under 'Filters' and 'Options' to ensure they are set to 'any' or left empty.
Check and potentially remove any date filters that may restrict the results.
Set the Limit parameter to a reasonable value or leave it empty to use the API default.
Run the node again to check if orders are returned.
agent_instruction: Adjust the filters and options in the Shopify 'Get All Orders' node settings and run the node again.
